entities.name: Token Expiry Buffer
entities.context: 60-second safety margin subtracted from token expiry to prevent edge-case auth failures

relationships.context: Script authenticates against Fitbit's OAuth2 token endpoint to access health data
Core auth mechanism: refresh_tokens() exchanges refresh_token for new access_token via TOKEN_URL
Client ID and secret encoded as Basic auth header for token requests
Subtracts 60 seconds from expires_in to ensure token is refreshed before actual expiry
